cn: 这里是 LeadFlow Memory 的转化 Agent 工作台。
en: This is the LeadFlow Memory conversion agent workbench.

cn: 选中高意向线索陈薇，调出她的完整客户画像。
en: Select high-intent lead Chen Wei and open her full profile.

cn: 预算、区域、需求和来源信号都来自长期记忆。
en: Budget, district, needs and source signals all come from long-term memory.

cn: 跟进话术由记忆驱动，并标注了本次用到的记忆。
en: The follow-up script is memory-driven and cites the memory it used.

cn: MemWal 记忆页展示沉淀下来的长期语义记忆。
en: The MemWal tab shows the accumulated long-term semantic memory.

cn: Walrus 物料页里每一份材料都可被验证。
en: On the Walrus tab, every artifact is verifiable.

cn: Agent Trace 完整记录了智能体的决策轨迹。
en: Agent Trace records the full decision trail of the agent.

cn: 底部时间线串起从发现到跟进的每一步进度。
en: The bottom timeline links every step from discovery to follow-up.

cn: 界面支持中英文一键切换。
en: The interface switches between Chinese and English in one click.

cn: 记忆让每一次跟进都更懂客户。
en: Memory makes every follow-up understand the customer better.
